evidence.snippet:
Advanced composites manufacturing
---------------------------------
The team behind **Composites Universal Group** brings creative solutions to complex market-driven problems with friendly, dedicated customer service and meticulous process quality control.

*   Primary and secondary flight structures
*   Satellite panels and aerospace enclosures
*   UAV fuselages and aerodynamic surfaces
*   Thermal and RF shielding components
*   Lightweight support beams and ribs

items.notes: Contract manufacturer of composite structural parts and assemblies for aerospace/defense/UAV programs. Produces carbon fiber, CFRP, and advanced composite structures including UAV fuselages and aerodynamic surfaces.

products_categories.notes: Primary business is custom composite manufacturing (structural parts, assemblies) for OEM customers including Boeing, Lockheed Martin, SpaceX, Nauticus Robotics. No catalog SKUs. A skipped page /uuv-prototyping-and-development suggests underwater UXV-specific work as well.

value.address: 58144 Old Portland Rd, Building B, Warren, OR 97053

headquarters.notes: Address is consistent across all pages. One blog post (resource-0008) erroneously says 'Based in California' but this appears to be SEO content; the physical address on every page footer is Warren, OR.

evidence.snippet: With three decades of experience supporting the experimental aircraft, aerospace, and unmanned industries, our composite manufacturing abilities also extend to emerging technologies in defense, transportation, medical, and industrial applications.

*   UAV fuselages and aerodynamic surfaces
*   Thermal and RF shielding components
*   Lightweight support beams and ribs

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Manufactures custom composite structural parts (UAV fuselages, aerodynamic surfaces, primary/secondary flight structures) for aerospace and UAV OEM customers. Not an OEM or platform designer — supplies structural composite components to integrators and OEMs.

products.notes: CUG is a contract/custom manufacturer with no named product SKUs. Their offerings are manufacturing services (engineering, prototyping, tooling, LRIP, full-rate production) for custom composite parts. The /services page was skipped and would list specific service categories.

evidence.snippet: *   ITAR-aware workflows for controlled programs (when applicable)

ndaa.notes: Site explicitly references ITAR-aware workflows, AS9100D, and NADCAP (in-progress), but makes no claim of NDAA Section 848/889 compliance.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS / Blue sUAS reference found in any fetched page.

evidence.snippet: Full-service capabilities for engineering services, prototyping, tooling, and production.
Whether you’re developing prototypes or need full-rate production, we have the technical capabilities and quality systems in place to support your program through every phase.

readiness.notes: Site explicitly supports full-rate production with AS9100D quality system. Also offers LRIP ramp-up programs and prototyping, but primary posture is production for aerospace OEM programs.

tagline: Contract composite manufacturer of UAV fuselages, aerodynamic surfaces, and primary flight structures for aerospace platforms, with capabilities in CFRP layup, autoclave/OOA curing, RTM, and in-house NDT. Serves primes including Lockheed Martin, Boeing, and Sierra Nevada Corporation. NDAA compliance status and specific defense program involvement not publicly disclosed; Blue UAS certification status unknown.
